title: dodecatheon frenchii
intro: Dodecatheon frenchii, also known as the French's shooting star, is a perennial wildflower native to the western United States and Canada. It belongs to the gentian family and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial compounds. The plant is valued for its potential health benefits, such as reducing fever, soothing digestive issues, and supporting the immune system. In herbal preparations, Dodecatheon frenchii is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures to harness its medicinal properties.
